subcodes.first_line: O spiritual beloved! This Prisoner's yearning increaseth ever more, and His burning anguish and consuming grief, born of separation, grow ever more intense, leaving Him in sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب روحانی این زندانیرا اشتیاق بیش و سوزش و احتراق از فراق افزون و محزون
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
